rentals.name: Adventure Ladakh Bike Rentals
rentals.notes: Himalayan 450 with crash guards and luggage rack included. Valid driving licence mandatory. Helmet, gloves, and knee-pads provided. Full tank on pickup; return full tank.

rentals.name: Ladakh Bike Rental House
rentals.notes: Classic 350 — good for paved roads but not recommended for challenging mountain passes. Helmet included. Insurance available for ₹200/day extra.

rentals.name: Ladakh SUV Rentals
rentals.notes: Includes experienced Ladakhi driver who knows mountain roads. Covers Pangong and Nubra permit routes. No self-drive option for Innova — driver included only. Fuel extra.

rentals.name: Changspa Scooter Rentals
rentals.notes: Scooter suitable for Leh town and day trips to Magnetic Hill, Hall of Fame, and Shey. Not recommended above 4,000m — engine may struggle. Helmet included.

rentals.name: Himalayan Jeep Safaris
rentals.notes: Open-top Thar for an authentic Ladakhi experience. Perfect for sand dunes at Nubra and mountain passes. Self-drive with valid DL. Driver available for ₹1,500 extra.
